trigger_condition: two or more translator artifacts share the same file path
guard_snippet: zip.file(artifact.path, contentWithProvenance) — no deduplication or warning
potential_consequence: Later artifact silently overwrites earlier one in the ZIP. User gets incomplete output without notification.
Filename like 'foo/bar.zip' creates unexpected directory structure in download dialog. No validation beyond whitespace normalization.

trigger_condition: playbook is non-null but exportReadiness.canExport is false (race between render and click)
guard_snippet: if (playbook == null) return — only guards null, not readiness
potential_consequence: Export proceeds with invalid rule drafts. User downloads a bundle from an invalid state.

trigger_condition: PROVENANCE_LINE contains backtick characters inside existing generated file content
potential_consequence: Provenance detection is exact-match only. If generated content incidentally includes the same string (unlikely but possible), dedup fails silently and provenance is not prepended.

trigger_condition: browser takes longer than 100 ms to begin the download
potential_consequence: Anchor removed from DOM before download starts. Download fails silently in some browsers.

trigger_condition: URL.createObjectURL is called more than ~50 times before garbage collection
guard_snippet: No cleanup limit or revocation tracking
potential_consequence: Memory leak from unreleased object URLs if downloadBlob is called repeatedly and each revocation is delayed by the 100 ms timeout.
Only the last extension is matched. 'my.config.yaml' → detected as '.yaml' correctly, but 'component.test.tsx' → '.tsx' correctly. Edge case handled correctly — no issue.
Defaults to '#' prefix. Makefile expects '#', which is correct. Dockerfile expects '#', also correct. Handled.
